title: Seven-day community news source-chain sample
purpose: Help a person or group see how much news reached them through platforms, creators, or AI intermediaries before they act on it.
review_cadence: Weekly reflection or before a civic/media-literacy discussion.

source_chain_items.missing_context: Need direct district page and date

reflection_prompts: Which item changed what you believed or planned to do?
Did you check the original source before sharing?
Which source chain would you want a student/family member to understand better?

sections.heading: Source-chain receipt
rows: Need direct district page and date

sections.heading: Reflection prompts
items: Which item changed what you believed or planned to do?
Did you check the original source before sharing?
Which source chain would you want a student/family member to understand better?

review_flags: Privacy-sensitive; do not require sharing browsing history
boundary_note: Private reflection/review aid only. Do not collect personal browsing history or use this as surveillance.
notes: Synthetic example tied to Source Confidence Ledger and media-trust work.
